title: Low effort signal
action: Post one poll and compare replies vs clicks after 24 hours.
sample_text: Who wins World Cup 2026? Brazil, Argentina, France, or Spain? #WorldCup2026 #Football
guardrail: Human review only. Do not mass-post or automate platform actions.

title: Prediction card test
action: Use one champion card, then ask followers to change one knockout step.
sample_text: Ronaldo's 2002 redemption arc still makes Brazil predictions feel different. My early Brazil 2026 take: they have a real path if the knockout draw is kind. #WorldCup2026 #Football
guardrail: Human review only. Do not mass-post or automate platform actions.

title: Discussion hook
action: Run a dark-horse question when prediction posts feel repetitive.
sample_text: Japan as a 2026 dark horse sounds risky until you remember: Japan beating Germany and Spain in 2022 is exactly why nobody should treat them lightly. Am I overrating them or is the path actually there? #WorldCup2026 #Football
guardrail: Human review only. Do not mass-post or automate platform actions.

title: Humor reset
action: Use a funny post after two serious football takes in a row.
sample_text: World Cup 2026 is still far away, but the group chat is already choosing champions. #WorldCup2026 #Football
guardrail: Human review only. Do not mass-post or automate platform actions.

title: Debate spark
action: Use a football-only hot take, then manually reply to the best counterarguments.
sample_text: Brazil will not win World Cup 2026. Too much attacking talent, not enough knockout calm. Convince me I am wrong. #WorldCup2026 #Football
guardrail: Human review only. Do not mass-post or automate platform actions.
